title: Coller Capital Buys $477 Million of New Mountain BDC Assets
description: Coller Capital, a secondaries firm, agreed to buy $477 million of assets from New Mountain Finance Corp. as the private credit fund looked to boost its financial flexibility.
content: Coller Capital, a secondaries firm, agreed to buy $477 million of assets from New Mountain Finance Corp. as the private credit fund looked to boost its financial flexibility.
